name: Club
description: A simple wooden club.

name: Dagger
description: A small, easily concealed blade.

name: Greatsword
description: A massive two-handed sword.

name: Longbow
description: A tall bow for ranged attacks.

name: Shortsword
description: A short, stabbing sword.

name: Battleaxe
description: A sturdy axe for battle.

name: Mace, Heavy
description: A heavy, bludgeoning mace.

name: Quarterstaff
description: A long wooden staff.

name: Padded Armor
description: Quilted layers of cloth.

name: Leather Armor
description: Cured leather armor.

name: Chain Shirt
description: A shirt of interlocking metal rings.

name: Scale Mail
description: Armor of overlapping metal scales.

name: Breastplate
description: A solid metal chestplate.

name: Full Plate
description: The best protection money can buy.

name: Shield, Heavy Steel
description: A large steel shield.

name: Shield, Light Wooden
description: A small wooden shield.

name: Backpack
description: A sturdy backpack for carrying gear.

name: Rope, 50 ft.
description: A 50-foot coil of hempen rope.

name: Torch
description: A simple wooden torch.

name: Rations
description: Enough food for one day.

name: Waterskin
description: A leather container for water.

name: Bedroll
description: A simple bedroll for sleeping.

name: Flint and Steel
description: Used to start fires.

name: Lantern, Hooded
description: A lantern with a hood to control light.

name: Potion of Cure Light Wounds
description: Heals 1d8+1 HP.

name: Potion of Bull's Strength
description: +4 Strength for 3 minutes.

name: Scroll of Magic Missile
description: Casts Magic Missile.

name: Scroll of Fireball
description: Casts Fireball.

name: +1 Longsword
description: A longsword with a +1 enhancement bonus.

name: +1 Chain Shirt
description: A chain shirt with a +1 enhancement bonus.

name: Cloak of Resistance +1
description: +1 resistance bonus on all saves.

name: Bag of Holding
description: A bag that can hold far more than its size suggests.

name: Ring of Protection +1
description: +1 deflection bonus to AC.

name: Amulet of Natural Armor +1
description: +1 natural armor bonus to AC.

name: Masterwork Longsword
description: A beautifully crafted longsword. +1 to attack rolls.

name: Masterwork Shortsword
description: A finely honed shortsword. +1 to attack rolls.

name: Masterwork Battleaxe
description: A masterfully forged battleaxe. +1 to attack rolls.

name: Masterwork Dagger
description: A razor-sharp dagger of exceptional quality. +1 to attack rolls.

name: Masterwork Leather Armor
description: Supple leather armor of superior craftsmanship.

name: Masterwork Chain Shirt
description: A finely linked chain shirt. Reduced armor check penalty.

name: Masterwork Scale Mail
description: Expertly fitted scale mail with polished plates.

name: Masterwork Heavy Steel Shield
description: A heavy shield of superior craftsmanship.

name: Masterwork Longbow
description: A precision-crafted longbow. +1 to attack rolls.

name: +1 Shortsword
description: A shortsword with a +1 enhancement bonus. Glows faintly.

name: +1 Battleaxe
description: A battleaxe with a +1 enhancement bonus. Hums with power.

name: +1 Dagger
description: A dagger with a +1 enhancement bonus. Never dulls.

name: +1 Leather Armor
description: Leather armor with a +1 enhancement bonus.

name: +1 Scale Mail
description: Scale mail with a +1 enhancement bonus.

name: +1 Heavy Steel Shield
description: A heavy steel shield with a +1 enhancement bonus.

name: +1 Longbow
description: A longbow with a +1 enhancement bonus. Arrows fly true.

name: +2 Longsword
description: A longsword with a +2 enhancement bonus. Blazes with inner light.

name: +2 Chain Shirt
description: A chain shirt with a +2 enhancement bonus.

name: +2 Heavy Steel Shield
description: A heavy steel shield with a +2 enhancement bonus.

name: Cloak of Resistance +2
description: +2 resistance bonus on all saves.

name: Ring of Protection +2
description: +2 deflection bonus to AC.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
description: +2 enhancement bonus to Strength.

name: Arcane Ink
description: Shimmering ink infused with arcane energy, used for scroll scribing.

name: Blank Parchment
description: A sheet of fine parchment suitable for scroll scribing.

name: Blank Scroll Case
description: A reinforced scroll case for higher-level scrolls.

name: Purified Water
description: Ritually purified water, essential for potion brewing.

name: Alchemical Reagent
description: A volatile mixture of rare compounds used in alchemy.

name: Enchanting Dust
description: Fine crystalline dust that resonates with magical energy. Essential for enchanting.

name: Elemental Essence (Fire)
description: A captured fragment of elemental fire, pulsing with heat.

name: Elemental Essence (Cold)
description: A shard of crystallized cold, painfully frigid to the touch.

name: Elemental Essence (Lightning)
description: A crackling mote of captured lightning, contained in a glass sphere.

name: Elemental Essence (Acid)
description: A bubbling vial of concentrated elemental acid.

name: Mystical Gemstone
description: A gemstone that pulses with inner magical light. Used in rings and wondrous items.

name: Wand Blank (Oak)
description: A carefully shaped oak rod prepared for wand crafting.

name: Wand Blank (Yew)
description: A yew rod of exceptional quality, suitable for powerful wands.

name: Rod Core
description: A dense metallic core around which magical rods are constructed.

name: Staff Shaft
description: A length of ancient wood, perfectly suited for staff crafting.

name: Base Ring (Silver)
description: A plain silver ring band, ready to be enchanted.

name: Base Ring (Gold)
description: A plain gold ring band of high purity.

name: Base Ring (Mithral)
description: A mithral ring band that hums faintly with latent magic.

name: Pristine Crystal
description: A flawless crystal that focuses and amplifies magical energy.

name: Phoenix Feather
description: A radiant feather from a phoenix, warm to the touch. Extremely rare.

name: Unicorn Hair
description: A single hair from a unicorn's mane, shimmering with purity.

name: Essence of Divination
description: A swirling liquid that shows glimpses of possible futures.

name: Shadow Silk
description: Fabric woven from shadowstuff. Light seems to bend around it.

name: Celestial Thread
description: Thread spun from celestial essence, glowing with soft golden light.

name: Infernal Binding
description: Dark chains of condensed fiendish energy, used in rod and staff crafting.

name: Mage's Quicksilver
description: Liquid metal that responds to magical intention. A universal enchanting catalyst.

name: Glass Vial
description: A small glass vial suitable for holding potions.

name: Leather Strip
description: A prepared strip of leather for weapon grips and armor bindings.

name: Silver Wire
description: Fine silver wire used in jewelry and amulet crafting.

name: Gem Dust
description: Finely ground gemstone powder used in enchanting.

name: Masterwork Weapon Kit
description: Specialized tools and premium materials for creating masterwork weapons.

name: Masterwork Armor Kit
description: Specialized tools and premium materials for creating masterwork armor.

name: Masterwork Shortsword
description: A well-balanced shortsword with a blued steel blade and a leather-wrapped grip. The workmanship grants a +1 bonus to attack rolls.

name: Masterwork Studded Leather
description: Supple leather armor reinforced with closely-spaced iron studs. The exacting fit reduces its armor check penalty and allows freer movement.

name: Pekakarlik Signet Ring
description: A ring of dull grey stone polished smooth, its face carved with the overturned-anvil mark of the Pekakarlik tunnel-stewards. It is not magical, but Pekakarlik who see it worn tend to notice.

name: Waterward Amulet
description: A carved river-pearl hung on a silver chain, blessed at a shrine of Semyon. Grants resistance 5 against cold damage.

name: Shrine Pendant of Semyon
description: A small bronze pendant stamped with Semyon's river-crown. Grants a +1 sacred bonus on Will saves made against water-elemental effects.

name: Dark-Iron Dagger
description: A dwarven-forged dagger of iron smelted in a Deceiver-era foundry. The metal is blacker than ordinary iron and takes and keeps an edge superbly. Masterwork: +1 to attack.

name: Kobold Fire-Cloak
description: A shoulder-cloak of overlapping reddish kobold scales stitched on canvas backing. The scales are dense enough to shrug aside small fires; grants +1 circumstance bonus on saves against fire effects.

name: Void-Touched Warhammer
description: A +1 warhammer whose head is banded with bars of dark iron. In dim light, the iron seems to swallow illumination rather than reflect it. On a critical hit, target saves vs Will DC 15 or is silenced for 1 round.

name: Dómnathar Cipher-Tablet
description: A slate tablet engraved with Dómnathar rank-cipher, small enough to fit in a belt-pouch. Of no combat value; but Kin intelligence-officers will pay handsomely for a clean copy, and the Wind-Riders will extend faction credit to whoever brings one in.

name: Dark-Iron Longsword
description: A longsword forged in Deceiver foundries from dark iron. The blade is blacker than night steel and takes an edge beautifully. Masterwork: +1 to attack.

name: Suppressor-Iron Collar
description: A collar of dark iron worked with runes not of Kin script. When worn, the wearer registers as dead to Kin-sense -- the same effect the Dómnathar use to hide captives from search-magic. Neutral in alignment, dangerous in intent.

name: Void-Rod of the Silent Host
description: A smooth black rod of unknown material, warm to the touch. 3/day the bearer may cast Silence (DC 15) centered on a target within 60 ft. 1/day the bearer may cast Dispel Magic at caster level 12.
